title: Flaky Fragrant Irish Potato Pie
description: A traditional Irish dish featuring flaky crust and fragrant potatoes, wrapped in pandan leaves for added flavor and nutrition, this pie is perfect for a comforting dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, combine sliced potatoes, allspice, salt, and black pepper, and toss to coat
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and saute chopped onion and minced garlic until softened
Add the potato mixture to the skillet and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the long fermentation dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch
Spoon the potato mixture onto one half of the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges
Fold the other half of the dough over the filling and press the edges to seal
Wrap the pie in pandan leaves, overlapping the leaves to cover the entire pie
Place the pie on a baking sheet and bake for 40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown
